title: Puff Pastry Galette Italiano
description: A simple yet elegant Italian-style dessert featuring puff pastry, indulgent ingredients, and a touch of char.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer pastry to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a small bowl, mix mascarpone cheese, raspberry jam, and granulated sugar.
Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Arrange fresh raspberries on top of the cheese mixture.
Fold the pastry edges up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the pastry with the beaten egg and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until pastry is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
